text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the efforts (and pocket money) of
Director Akikawa, a Pro Shop has opened up
within the school store! It boasts a wide variety of
useful training items.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What's more, these items can be obtained by
exchanging Pro Shop coins rather than spending
regular money.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear that coins are awarded based on race
results. So let's earn as many as possible and put
them to good use!
